title: mentha × intercedens
intro: Mentha × intercedens, also known as intermediate mint, is a hybrid mint plant that is a cross between peppermint (Mentha × piperita) and spearmint (Mentha spicata). The medicinal properties of Mentha × intercedens include its essential oils, which contain compounds like menthol, menthone, and limonene, that have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × intercedens include its ability to alleviate nausea and vomiting, relieve stress and anxiety, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Mentha × intercedens can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
